name: ai-realtime-canvas
description: Collaborative canvas — prompt to JSON shapes, rendered with React Konva, synced live over Socket.IO.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix packages/server && npm install --prefix packages/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix packages/server" "npm run dev --prefix packages/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/server && npm run build --prefix packages/web
